import signal
import threading
import os


def cleanup(signum, frame):
    print("Cleaning up...")


signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, cleanup)

worker = threading.Thread(target=lambda: None, daemon=True)
worker.start()

os.environ["APP_MODE"] = "production"

with open("/tmp/app.pid", "w") as f:
    f.write(str(os.getpid()))
